svg.title: ASM simulation algorithm flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the Abelian Sandpile Model simulation loop from initialisation through grain addition, toppling, and avalanche recording.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the sandpile lattice initialised?')
sendPrompt('How is a random grain drop site chosen?')
sendPrompt('What is the toppling rule in the sandpile model?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a site topples in the sandpile model?')
sendPrompt('How are boundary dissipation effects handled?')
sendPrompt('What statistics are recorded for each avalanche?')
sendPrompt('How many grain drops are simulated?')
sendPrompt('How is the power-law exponent fitted to the avalanche data?')
